# New Cali Construction Inc.

> Culver City's top-rated remodeling contractor. Full-service design-build general contractor specializing in kitchen remodels, bathroom renovations, ADU and garage conversions, and whole-home remodels across Culver City and the Westside of Los Angeles.

## Business summary

- **Name:** New Cali Construction Inc.
- **Address:** 10000 Washington Blvd. Suite #600, Culver City, CA 90232
- **Phone:** (800) 216-1005
- **Email:** Info@NewCaliConstruction.com
- **Website:** https://www.newcaliconstruction.com/
- **License:** California Contractor License #1008892 (licensed, bonded, insured)
- **Founded:** 2017
- **Owner:** Asaf K.
- **Hours:** Monday through Saturday, 8:00am - 6:00pm
- **Rating:** 50+ five-star reviews on Yelp
- **Completed projects:** 500+

## Services

- **Kitchen Remodeling** - Full turnkey kitchen renovations, cabinet and countertop upgrades, layout changes, structural updates. Price range $15,000 - $100,000+. Typical timeline 2-10 weeks. See https://www.newcaliconstruction.com/kitchen.html
- **Bathroom Remodeling** - Guest bath refreshes to full master suite expansions, including plumbing, electrical, tile, fixtures. Price range $15,000 - $60,000+. Typical timeline 2-4 weeks for standard, 4-8 weeks for master suites. See https://www.newcaliconstruction.com/bathroom.html
- **ADU Construction & Garage Conversion** - End-to-end accessory dwelling unit construction and garage conversions including design, engineering, city permits, and build. Price range $80,000 - $180,000. Timeline 3-5 months. See https://www.newcaliconstruction.com/adu.html
- **Whole Home Remodeling** - Start-to-finish design-build whole-house renovations including demolition, framing, electrical, plumbing, HVAC, flooring, finishes. Price range $80,000 - $400,000+. Timeline 3-6 months. See https://www.newcaliconstruction.com/home-remodel.html

## Service area

Culver City, Los Angeles, West LA, Santa Monica, Beverly Hills, Playa Vista, Mar Vista, Marina Del Rey, Inglewood, Malibu, Bel Air, Hawthorne, El Segundo, Westchester, Pacific Palisades, Mid City.

## Pricing tiers

- **Entry projects:** $15K - $40K (bathroom refreshes, kitchen upgrades, flooring, paint)
- **Signature projects:** $40K - $120K (full kitchen remodels, master bath renovations, room additions) - most common range
- **Premium projects:** $120K - $500K+ (whole home remodels, ADUs, multi-room design-build)

Every project begins with a free in-home consultation and a written line-item scope of work. The price is locked in writing before any work begins.

## The New Cali Promise (four-part guarantee, all in writing)

1. **We Show Up Day 1** - If the crew does not show up on the agreed start date, the homeowner owes us nothing. No deposit held, no questions asked.
2. **Written Scope Before We Touch Anything** - Every project starts with a detailed, line-item written scope of work signed by both parties before demolition begins.
3. **Weekly Photo Updates** - Homeowners receive progress photos every week, so they always know what is happening on the job site.
4. **On-Time, On-Budget - Or We Make It Right** - No surprise invoices, no scope creep without signed approval. If we go over on a locked item, that is on New Cali Construction, not the client.

## How the process works (four steps)

1. **You reach out** - Free, no-pressure contact via phone or form.
2. **We write a detailed scope** - The homeowner chooses whether to have an in-home visit or send photos and video of the space. Either way, a detailed line-item scope is written.
3. **You approve the price** - The price is locked in writing. No surprise invoices or unapproved scope changes.
4. **We build and keep you in the loop** - Day 1 start, weekly photo updates, delivered on time and on budget through the final walkthrough.

- ADU / Garage Conversion: https://www.newcaliconstruction.com/adu.html
- Complete Home Remodel: https://www.newcaliconstruction.com/home-remodel.html

## How New Cali Construction answers the top homeowner fears

- "Will the contractor disappear after I pay?" - Weekly photo updates and milestone-based payments. The crew is only paid as work is delivered. No deposit is held if the crew fails to show up on Day 1.
- "Will the price blow up mid-project?" - A written line-item scope with a locked price is signed before any work begins. Scope changes require the homeowner's signed approval. Overages on locked items are absorbed by New Cali Construction.
- "Can I trust this crew in my home?" - Fully licensed (California Contractor License #1008892), bonded, insured, and background-checked. Most of the crew has been with the company for years.
